# Garv Arora
> Full-stack & AI developer and CS student at Manipal University Jaipur. Ships production AI and web apps, and builds websites for small premium service businesses.

## Key facts
- Name: Garv Arora
- Role: Full-stack & AI Developer
- Education: B.Tech Computer Science, Manipal University Jaipur (2nd year)
- Focus: AI/LLM applications, full-stack web development, freelance web design
- Contact: garvarora426@gmail.com

## Projects
- Moodify — AI music recommender: describe a mood in plain language, get a tailored Spotify playlist. Built with Groq LLaMA 3, Flask, React/Vite, and the Spotify Web API. Cut response latency ~83% (30s+ down to 4-6s). Live: https://moodify-pbl.netlify.app
- DeadPixel — Hackathon project: a real-time API health dashboard that monitors endpoints and uses GPT-4 to auto-suggest fixes for broken endpoints. Built with React and GPT-4. Live: https://deadpixelpro.vercel.app
